task_completion.description: Navigate to the user management section and locate the target user 'jsmith'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Nuxeo 'Users & Groups' or Admin Center interface is visible, showing a search for 'jsmith' or the user profile page for 'jsmith' opened.

task_completion.description: Update the user's First Name to 'Jonathan'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the user edit form, the 'First Name' text field contains the value 'Jonathan'.
In the user edit form, the 'Email' text field contains the value 'jonathan.smith@newcorp-intl.com'.

task_completion.description: Update the user's Company to 'NewCorp International'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the user edit form, the 'Company' text field contains the value 'NewCorp International'.

task_completion.description: Add the user to the 'powerusers' group while keeping the 'members' group.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the groups selection area of the user edit form, both 'members' and 'powerusers' are visibly selected or listed as assigned groups.

task_completion.description: Save the changes to the user profile.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The user profile view (read-only mode) displays the updated First Name, Email, Company, and Groups, or a success notification is visible indicating the user was saved.

integrity.description: The agent used the Nuxeo web interface to make changes, not terminal commands.
integrity.visual_evidence: Interactions occur within the web browser. There should be no terminal windows open executing 'curl' commands to the Nuxeo REST API.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the genuine Nuxeo application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The screen shows the standard Nuxeo Platform 10.10 interface (headers, menus, styling) rather than a text editor or a mocked HTML page.

integrity.description: The agent did not bypass the application by directly modifying the database.
integrity.visual_evidence: There should be no terminal windows open running 'psql' or other database client commands to alter the PostgreSQL database directly.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target User: 'jsmith'. Expected final state: First Name must be 'Jonathan' (changed from 'John'). Email must be 'jonathan.smith@newcorp-intl.com' (changed from 'jsmith@acmecorp.com'). Company must be 'NewCorp International' (changed from 'Acme Corp'). Groups must include BOTH 'members' and 'powerusers'. The application is Nuxeo 10.10.
